name_en: New Soft Lux Large in Suede🎉1BA433🎉🎉 In stock. This handbag and crossbody bag is made of imported matte leather, exuding a classical vibe. It comes with a detachable and adjustable long shoulder strap for different occasions. Huge capacity, super practical👏. A must-have for fashionistas. Get this retro-style handbag home now!
